name: xlsx
tagline: Creates, edits, and analyzes Excel/CSV/TSV spreadsheets with openpyxl/pandas, enforcing formula recalculation, formatting, and.
verdict: Strong, well-engineered skill: precise trigger and exclusion criteria, concrete commands, worked examples, detailed failure handling (recalc errors, broken external links, non-evaluating post-2007 functions), and idempotent recalculation. Weak spots: no version/changelog signal, and the pip-install fallback for openpyxl/pandas/markitdown is unpinned (low.

highlights.summary: Fallback `pip install` for openpyxl/pandas/markitdown (line 16) has no version pin; low risk since these are well-known packages.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in frontmatter or body.
